query.sql: Select isnull(CompnyName,'')as CompnyName, isnull(ad.Street, '') as Street, isnull(ad.StreetF, '') as StreetF, isnull(ad.Block, '') as Block, isnull(ad.BlockF, '') as BlockF, isnull(ad.City, '') as City, isnull(ad.CityF, '') as CityF, isnull(ad.ZipCode, '') as ZipCode, isnull(ad.ZipCodeF, '') as ZipCodeF, isnull(ad.County, '') as County, isnull(ad.CountyF, '') as CountyF, isnull(Phone1, '') as Phone1, isnull(Phone1F, '') as Phone1F, isnull(Phone2, '') as Phone2, isnull(Phone2F, '') as Phone2F, isnull(Fax, '') as Fax, isnull(FaxF, '') as FaxF, isnull(E_Mail, '') as E_Mail, isnull(IntrntAdrs, '') as WWW, isnull(TaxIdNum, '') as TaxIdNum, isnull(TaxIdNum2, '') as TaxIdNum2, isnull(TaxIdNum3, '') as TaxIdNum3, isnull(FreeZoneNo, '') as FreeZoneNo, isnull(PBSNumber, '') as PBSNumber, isnull(PBSNumber, '') as PBSNumber, isnull(PBSGroupNo, '') as PBSGroupNo from OADM left join ADM1 ad on isnull(ad.CurrPeriod, 'a') = isnull(OADM.CurrPeriod, 'a')
Select isnull(D.Account, '') as Account, isnull(D.Branch, '') as Branch from [DSC1] D left join ODSC O on O.AbsEntry = D.BankKey left join OADM A on A.DflBnkKey = O.AbsEntry

SELECT OINV.DocEntry, OINV.DocNum, OINV.DocType, OINV.DocDate, OCTG.PymntGroup, OINV.DocDueDate, OINV.CardCode, OINV.CardName, ISNULL(OCPR.Name, '') AS ContactPerson, ISNULL(OCRD.U_AIG_EAN, '') AS 'EAN no.', OINV.Address, ISNULL(OINV.NumAtCard, '') AS NumAtCard, OINV.VatPercent, OINV.VatSum, OINV.VatSumFC, OINV.DiscPrcnt, OINV.DiscSum, OINV.DiscSumFC, OINV.DocCur, OINV.DocRate, OINV.DocTotal, OINV.DocTotalFC, ISNULL(OINV.Comments, '') AS Comments, ISNULL(OINV.FatherCard, '') AS FatherCard, OINV.TotalExpns, OINV.TotalExpFC, ISNULL(OINV.PaymentRef, '') AS PaymentRef, ISNULL(OSLP.SlpName, '') AS SalesPerson, ISNULL(P.U_Name, '') AS CaseName, ISNULL(OINV.Header, '') AS Header, ISNULL(OINV.Footer, '') AS Footer FROM OINV INNER JOIN OCRD ON OCRD.CardCode = OINV.CardCode LEFT OUTER JOIN OCTG ON OCTG.GroupNum = OINV.GroupNum LEFT OUTER JOIN OCPR ON OCPR.CntctCode = OINV.CntctCode AND OCPR.CardCode = OINV.CardCode LEFT OUTER JOIN OSLP ON OSLP.SlpCode = OINV.SlpCode LEFT OUTER JOIN "@RCS_WTM_PROJECTS" P on P.U_SAPInvoiceNr = OINV.DocEntry WHERE OINV.DocEntry = [#DocEntry]

select * from (select AftLineNum as LineNum, OrderNum, LineType, convert(nvarchar(MAX), LineText) as LineText, '' as ItemCode, '' as Dscription, 0 as Quantity, 0 as DiscPrcnt, ''as Currency, '' as FreeTxt, 0 as TotInclTax, 0 as Price, 0 as LineTotal, 0 as TotalFrgn, '19000101' as ShipDate from [INV10] join OINV on OINV.DocEntry = INV10.DocEntry where OINV.DocEntry = [#DocEntry] union select LineNum, 0 as OrderNum, 'Line' as LineType,'LineTable' as LineText, ItemCode, isnull(Dscription, '') as Dscription, Quantity, INV1.DiscPrcnt, Currency, isnull(FreeTxt, ''), TotInclTax, Price, LineTotal, TotalFrgn, ShipDate from [INV1] join OINV on OINV.DocEntry = INV1.DocEntry where OINV.DocEntry = [#DocEntry] ) tmp order by LineNum, OrderNum
